prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度偏热，但该校在黑龙江招生的物理类专业以传统工科（机械、土木、纺织、采矿）为主，与热门方向匹配度一般；本省2026年考生总数约167000，较2025年172114减少约5114人，竞争略有缓解；省控线2025年物理类本科批360分，与2024年持平，无明显变化；新疆大学位于乌鲁木齐市，距黑龙江较远，跨省报考地域偏好偏弱；该校在黑龙江招生计划占比较小（约40人），本地考生跨省报考意愿一般。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的异常波动、2026年招生计划持平、本省考生总数小幅下降及地域偏好偏弱等因素，预计2026年位次在2025年基准上略有回调；预测最低位次约43126名，区间42626–43626名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 25977 → 32898 → 31853 → 32050 → 43426, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 11376 places in the last two years; the 2025 baseline is about 43426, with large fluctuations; the provincial enrollment plan was 37 in 2021, 38 in 2022–2024, 40 in 2025, and 40 in 2026, with 2026 unchanged from 2025, no expansion or reduction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 131st in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, fluctuating between 129–163 in recent years, belonging to the mid-to-late tier of 211 universities; no relevant records for Xinjiang University in the 2026 reputation evaluation; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 72nd (average), short video exposure moderate, no high heat or obvious negative public opinion; no data on historical abnormal admission records; fifth round of discipline evaluation data.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering are socially popular, but the physics category majors offered by the university in Heilongjiang are mainly traditional engineering (mechanical, civil, textile, mining), with average alignment with popular directions; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 167,000, a decrease of about 5,114 from 172,114 in 2025, slightly easing competition; the provincial control line for the 2025 physics category undergraduate batch is 360 points, unchanged from 2024; Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, far from Heilongjiang, with weak cross-province application regional preference; the university's enrollment plan in Heilongjiang accounts for a small proportion (about 40 people), and local examinees have average willingness to apply across provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the abnormal large backward shift in 2025 rankings, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, slight decrease in the total number of examinees in the province, and weak regional preference, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will slightly rebound from the 2025 baseline; the predicted minimum ranking is about 43126, with a range of 42626–43626.
